offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of rental income causes cash flow gaps. We provide a real estate portfolio management tool instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem: inefficient tracking of rental income and occupancy
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month ask for help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month with a short demo video
Community forums/groups where property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month share tools
try_it: Let users try income tracking dashboard and occupancy rate calculator on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
